violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Boxes of food being stored on the floor in the walk-in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping clothes were left out on the cook line and in the bar area and not stored in a sanitizing solution. Sanitizing bucket on the line was at too low of a concentration. (150ppm)

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Inside of the ice machine needs to be cleaned.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee had an open drinking cup on the cook-line.
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
